geo_constraints: Based in Vancouver, BC, Canada. Acceptable: in-person or hybrid in Greater Vancouver (Burnaby, Richmond, North Vancouver, Surrey count); fully remote roles open to Canadian residents (or Pacific time zone or 'remote-Americas'/'remote-global'). NOT acceptable: US-only remote (very common in postings — phrases like 'US-based only', 'must reside in the United States', 'remote (US)'); in-person Toronto, NYC, SF, or any non-Vancouver office. Score US-only remote at 1-2 even if the role itself is a strong match.
